meaning: n.母鹿,雌兔等  (美国)能源部 DoE(Department of Energy)
examples: In fact he's not John Doe anymore, we have an ID.
The patient, referred to in the indictment as "Jane Doe," knew of Mr. Weill's secret plan.
She hit the doe in the shoulder.
Doe's research considers walk-on fares, which include season tickets, but not tickets that are bought in advance.
Why didn't the FBI and DOE monitor computer activity at Los Alamos more closely?
